## How I tested

- [ ] Loaded the plugin in a real vault and ran "Read note aloud with captions"
- [ ] Confirmed audio plays and captions highlight correctly
- [ ] (If pipeline change) Ran `python note_to_audio.py <note> --captions` and verified JSON payload
- [ ] (If accessibility change) Tested with the affected mode/setting
